context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures Magento indexers for production use on a large catalog, including setting schedule mode, enabling parallel/async indexing, and providing correct diagnostic procedures for stale data issues.

checklist.name: Schedule mode for price indexer
checklist.description: The setup script sets catalog_product_price indexer to 'schedule' mode (using indexer:set-mode schedule catalog_product_price)

checklist.name: Schedule mode for search indexer
checklist.description: The setup script sets catalogsearch_fulltext indexer to 'schedule' mode

checklist.name: Schedule mode for category indexers
checklist.description: The setup script sets both catalog_category_product and catalog_product_category (or catalog_category_flat and catalog_product_flat) to 'schedule' mode

checklist.name: Async indexing enabled
checklist.description: The setup script enables async/parallel indexing via 'bin/magento config:set dev/grid/async_indexing 1'

checklist.name: Batch sizes in env.php
checklist.description: The env-indexer-snippet.php sets batch_size for catalog_product_price with values for 'simple' and 'configurable' product types

checklist.name: Correct batch size values
checklist.description: The env.php snippet uses simple=200 and configurable=50 for catalog_product_price, and simple=500 for catalogsearch_fulltext

checklist.name: show-changelog for diagnosis
checklist.description: The runbook includes 'bin/magento indexer:show-changelog' as the command to diagnose pending index rows / stale data

checklist.name: Single indexer reindex preference
checklist.description: The runbook specifies reindexing a single indexer (e.g., catalog_product_price) rather than full 'indexer:reindex' when diagnosing price issues

checklist.name: Avoid full reindex during hours
checklist.description: The runbook explicitly cautions against running full reindex during business hours on production

checklist.name: Cron check for stopped indexing
checklist.description: The runbook includes checking cron job status (cron_schedule table, cron logs, or system crontab) when automatic reindexing stops

checklist.name: Changelog table monitoring
checklist.description: The runbook or setup script references monitoring changelog table sizes (e.g., catalog_product_price_cl) as an indicator of cron health

checklist.name: indexer:reset usage
checklist.description: The runbook or script includes 'bin/magento indexer:reset' to force a scheduled re-run of an indexer
